name: Agency Discovery Call Intake
opening_message: Thanks for getting in touch. I can capture the brief and route it to the right person.

required_fields.label: Company
required_fields.question: What company or project is this for?

required_fields.label: Email
required_fields.question: What email should the team use?
required_fields.why: Needed for proposal and meeting follow-up.

required_fields.label: Website
required_fields.question: What website or project link should the team review?
required_fields.why: Gives the team context before the call.

required_fields.label: Goal
required_fields.question: What are you trying to improve: leads, website, automation, security, AI, SEO, hosting, or something else?

required_fields.label: Timeline
required_fields.question: When do you want this live or improved?

follow_up_questions: What is the current problem costing or blocking?
Is there a budget range or decision deadline?
Are there technical constraints, compliance needs, or existing providers?

urgency_rules.match: site down, security incident, revenue outage, urgent campaign launch
funding deadline, procurement deadline, campaign date

urgency_rules.action: Collect brief and suggest discovery call.

sms_templates: Your project enquiry has been logged. Please reply with any links or files the team should review.
Thanks. The team will review your brief and contact you about the next step.
handoff_summary: Urgency reason and next suggested action
safety_notes: Do not promise pricing, deadlines, or technical outcomes before review.
Security incidents should be handled through an approved secure channel.
